meaning: vt.扎牢,扣住,闩住,拴紧,使固定,系,集中于,强加于vi.扣紧,抓住
examples: There were no instructions on how to fasten the carrying strap to the box.
When Ted was six we decided that he needed to know how to fasten and unfasten his seat belt.
Jewett and Sullivan would help fasten you into a pair of bright orange safety pants.
In 1968 a bronze pin of a type used to fasten a dress turned up.
